languages.text: "Мне рекомендовали вас как исключительного собеседника. Уделите мне пару минут?"

traits.locale_text: "Мне рекомендовали вас как исключительного собеседника. Уделите мне пару минут?"

languages.text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"
languages.original_text: "Мне рекомендовали вас как исключительного собеседника. Уделите мне пару минут?"

traits.locale_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"
"You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"
"You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

languages.text: “有人跟我提起过你，说你很擅长跟人聊天。可以占用你一点时间吗？”
languages.original_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

traits.locale_text: “有人跟我提起过你，说你很擅长跟人聊天。可以占用你一点时间吗？”

languages.text: « On m'a dit que vous aviez l'art de faire la conversation. Puis-je vous demander de m'accorder quelques instants ? »
languages.original_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

traits.locale_text: « On m'a dit que vous aviez l'art de faire la conversation. Puis-je vous demander de m'accorder quelques instants ? »

languages.text: "Oldukça hoşsohbet biri olduğunu işittim. Birkaç dakikanı alabilir miyim?"
languages.original_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

traits.locale_text: "Oldukça hoşsohbet biri olduğunu işittim. Birkaç dakikanı alabilir miyim?"

languages.text: «Me han dicho que es una interlocutora excepcional. ¿Podría dedicarme unos momentos de su tiempo?».
languages.original_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

traits.locale_text: «Me han dicho que es una interlocutora excepcional. ¿Podría dedicarme unos momentos de su tiempo?».

languages.text: "Ihr wurdet mir als außergewöhnliche Gesprächspartnerin empfohlen. Gewährt Ihr mir einige Momente Eurer Zeit?"
languages.original_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr wurdet mir als außergewöhnliche Gesprächspartnerin empfohlen. Gewährt Ihr mir einige Momente Eurer Zeit?"

languages.text: 「あなたは、会話が非常に上手な方だと聞いていました。少しお時間いただけますか？」
languages.original_text: "You were recommended to me as an exceptional conversationalist. Could I beg a few moments of your time?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは、会話が非常に上手な方だと聞いていました。少しお時間いただけますか？」
